name: Sentry
description: Monitor errors, debug issues, and analyze performance with the official Sentry MCP server

fields.label: Sentry Auth Token
fields.description: User auth token with org:read, project:read, project:write, team:read, event:write scopes

fields.label: Sentry Host
fields.description: Hostname for self-hosted Sentry (e.g. sentry.example.com). Leave empty for SaaS.

disableSkills.description: Comma-separated skills to disable (e.g. 'seer' for self-hosted without Seer)
